## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss transitioning to a new payment platform and resolve contract issues for specific employees.](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Transitioning from Remote to new platform: final Remote payments in early March, new contracts start March 1st](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Bridget's contract needs adjustment: semi-monthly schedule to be changed to monthly, prorated for February](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [David's contract requires updates: start date correction and signatory changes](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Action needed on Bridget's invoicing by tomorrow to avoid overpayment issues](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

## Topics

### Transition from Remote to New Platform

  - [Final Remote payouts in early March, then cancel all Remote contracts](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [New platform contracts to start March 1st, running simultaneously for \~1 week (no monetary impact)](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [March payment to be processed through new platform (likely end of March)](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

### Bridget's Contract and Payment Schedule

  - [Contract exists in Remote, but with semi-monthly payment schedule (unusual)](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Next invoice due Feb 15th - needs immediate attention](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Plan: Pause current schedule, create one-time invoice for prorated February amount](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Wiets to confirm any special arrangements with Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Molly emphasizes aligning Bridget's payment schedule with others (monthly)](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### David's Contract Setup

  - [Contract start date needs correction (from 12th to 18th February)](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Service period set to 15 days](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Signatory issue: Wiets' name incorrectly listed, needs changing to Kyle's](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Contract Management Challenges

  - [Unable to edit certain contract details in Remote](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Considered copying entire contract to "create your own" option for address/name changes](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Decided against making changes for just one person, given upcoming platform transition](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### New Hire (Unnamed) Contract

  - [Position: Content Editor (or possibly Content Manager)](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Contract details not finalized, deemed less critical due to platform transition](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Wiets to contact Bridget about payment schedule changes and confirm any special arrangements](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Pause or change Bridget's invoicing by tomorrow (Feb 13th) to prevent overpayment issues](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Wiets to discuss similar contract adjustments with David](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Review and potentially adjust unnamed new hire's contract details](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Proceed with transition plan: set up new platform contracts for March 1st start, prepare for final Remote payments in early March](https://fathom.video/share/fF1NBsvtcGdNuaJcQFf4nhkoL6qWtxs6?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
